items.question: Which AWS service provides a way to train machine learning models using SQL commands and utilize the trained model within their data warehouse for data forecasting purposes?
items.categoryName: Database Services (RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, Redshift, Neptune, ElastiCache)

items.question: A company has enlisted the help of TDojo Consulting Co. to assist them in designing an AWS disaster recovery solution for their on-premises bare metal servers and SQL databases. The implementation has to be robust, fast, and simple to use. It should also prevent any type of data loss from occurring. The company would like to keep track of the status of the migration.Which tool should the team adopt for the DR solution?
items.categoryName: Database Services (RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, Redshift, Neptune, ElastiCache)
